title: More Biome Coloured Blocks
description: Moss, Azaleas and more made biome coloured!
body:
# Moss, Azaleas and more made biome coloured!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VNYTqWBR/images/98d528b2e25ef1a37e950463a6856668dc51125e.png)

# List of Blocks Made Biome Coloured:

**Mossy Blocks:**
- Moss Block
- Moss Carpet
- Mossy Cobblestone
- Mossy Cobblestone Stairs
- Mossy Cobblestone Slab
- Mossy Cobblestone Wall
- Mossy Stone Bricks
- Mossy Stone Brick Stairs
- Mossy Stone Brick Slab
- Mossy Stone Brick

**Azalea Blocks:**
- Azalea
- Flowering Azalea
- Azalea Leaves
- Flowering Azalea Leaves
- Potted Azalea
- Potted Flowering Azalea

**Dripleaves:**
- Big Dripleaf _(Fixed stem poking through leaf when tilted)_
- Small Dripleaf _(Fixed stem texture stretching)_

**Misc:**
- Cave Vines (Glowberries)
- Spore Blossoms

# ⚠️ Incompatible with texturepacks interacting with any of these blocks mentioned!
